case_title: KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE INC. VS. GARIK LEVTMAN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,294.25 FILED BY KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LEVTMAN, GARIK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-03-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE, PER PLAINTIFF. CASE SETTLED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOHN LEGASPI--COMMUNITY RELATIONS--PUBLIC INFO. OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
